g.text: Why do we have multiple heaps?
spread the timers that are close by into different heaps
in this way they will be processed together (most likey) when
they reach tieir fireAt time. As they belong in a seperate queue
In case we have a very high number of timer requests and
we dont want to increase the number of heaps we can increase the
numebr of http workers. this can help reduce the latency in calling the
call back function after fire At time has been passed
